query: SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(m.id) as media_count FROM projects p LEFT JOIN media m ON p.id = m.projectId GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY media_count DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zhFTwZdMBa685Cr.4d37142b48ab --database FiS5WF2NaftJTm6fu3BYQb --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(m.id) as media_count FROM projects p LEFT JOIN media m ON p.id = m.projectId GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY media_count DESC;
